languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"

languages.text: "Мудрейший, я тут заполучила в свое распоряжение парочку артефактов, которые могли бы вас заинтересовать. Из большого уважения и симпатии, я готова буду пожертвовать их вам за весьма разумную цену!"
"O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"
languages.original_text: "Мудрейший, я тут заполучила в свое распоряжение парочку артефактов, которые могли бы вас заинтересовать. Из большого уважения и симпатии, я готова буду пожертвовать их вам за весьма разумную цену!"

traits.locale_text: "O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"
"O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"
"O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"

languages.text: «Oh, sabio entre los sabios, han llegado a mi posesión un par de artefactos que pueden interesarle. Por mi gran respeto y mi buena voluntad, ¡estoy dispuesta a donárselos por un precio más que razonable!».
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"

traits.locale_text: «Oh, sabio entre los sabios, han llegado a mi posesión un par de artefactos que pueden interesarle. Por mi gran respeto y mi buena voluntad, ¡estoy dispuesta a donárselos por un precio más que razonable!».

languages.text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、あなた様のご興味を引くやもしれぬ遺物がいくつか、アタシの手に入りましてね。深い敬意と善意から、ごく手頃なお値段でお譲りする用意がございますわ！」
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"

traits.locale_text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、あなた様のご興味を引くやもしれぬ遺物がいくつか、アタシの手に入りましてね。深い敬意と善意から、ごく手頃なお値段でお譲りする用意がございますわ！」

languages.text: “世间最睿智之人啊，我手里有几件你可能会感兴趣的造物。出于极大的尊重与善意，我愿意以极其公道的价格将它们捐赠于你！”
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"

traits.locale_text: “世间最睿智之人啊，我手里有几件你可能会感兴趣的造物。出于极大的尊重与善意，我愿意以极其公道的价格将它们捐赠于你！”

languages.text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, ich besitze einigen Artefakte, die Euch interessieren könnten. Aus Respekt und gutem Willen bin ich bereit, sie Euch zu einem überaus vernünftigen Preis zu schenken!"
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, ich besitze einigen Artefakte, die Euch interessieren könnten. Aus Respekt und gutem Willen bin ich bereit, sie Euch zu einem überaus vernünftigen Preis zu schenken!"

languages.text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, j'ai fait l'acquisition de certains artefacts qui pourraient vous intéresser. Par respect, et afin de vous prouver ma bonne volonté, je suis prête à vous en faire don pour un prix dérisoire ! »
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"

traits.locale_text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, j'ai fait l'acquisition de certains artefacts qui pourraient vous intéresser. Par respect, et afin de vous prouver ma bonne volonté, je suis prête à vous en faire don pour un prix dérisoire ! »

languages.text: "Ey bilge kimse, ilgini çekebilecek birkaç eser elime geçti. Büyük saygım ve iyi niyetimden dolayı bunları sana çok makul bir fiyata bağışlamaya hazırım!"
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, a couple of artefacts have come into my possession that may interest you. Out of great respect and goodwill, I am willing to donate them to you for a very reasonable price!"

traits.locale_text: "Ey bilge kimse, ilgini çekebilecek birkaç eser elime geçti. Büyük saygım ve iyi niyetimden dolayı bunları sana çok makul bir fiyata bağışlamaya hazırım!"
